items.title_zh: 10 名车主诉特斯拉 FSD 欺诈案国内开庭，索赔 395 万余元
items.title_en: 10 Tesla Owners Sue Over FSD Fraud, Claiming 3.95 Million Yuan
items.summary_zh: IT之家 5 月 29 日消息，据新京报报道，近日，一起针对特斯拉 FSD（完全自动驾驶）功能的集体诉讼案在北京市大兴区人民法院一审开庭。5 月 29 日，记者从原告律师王有银处获悉，10 名中国车主以虚假宣传、消费欺诈为由，将特斯拉告上法庭， 索赔金额合计 395 万余元 。特斯拉方对此案暂无回应。 原告方代理律师、北京圣运律师事务所创始人王有银律师透露，庭审中双方聚焦特斯拉 FSD 功能是否达到其宣传的“完全自动驾驶能力”举证辩论。原告方认为， 被告明知其宣传的“完全自动驾驶”功能未获中国监管部门批准，无法实现其宣传的核心功能 ，并隐瞒硬件技术缺陷，进行误导性宣传，诱使原告购买，其行为符合欺诈的构成要件。 王有银律师称，庭审中，被告特斯拉方主张 FSD 功能“现在已经实现”或“部分实现”，并称后续功能仍在研发中。 记者了解到，联合起诉的 10 名车主中， 其中 9 人要求就 FSD 功能本身“退一赔三”；另有一名车主主张整车“退一赔三” ，主要理由是完全自动驾驶能力是其购车唯一、决定性因素。十名车主索赔金额共计 395 万余元。 IT之家注意到，5 月 22 日，特斯拉中国官网将 FSD 功能的中文名称调整为“ 特斯拉辅助驾驶 ”，价格依旧为 6.4 万元。据官方介绍，该功能包括「基础辅助驾驶」和「增强辅助驾驶」套件的全部功能。 稍后推出特斯拉辅助驾驶功能 。未来车辆将能够：在…
items.summary_en: A class-action lawsuit against Tesla over its Full Self-Driving (FSD) feature has opened in Beijing, with 10 Chinese owners claiming false advertising and fraud, seeking 3.95 million yuan in damages. Tesla argues FSD is partially realized, while plaintiffs say it fails to deliver promised capabilities. Notably, Tesla China recently renamed FSD to "Tesla Assisted Driving" on its website.
items.why_zh: 此案是中国消费者首次就自动驾驶功能对特斯拉提起集体诉讼，可能影响特斯拉在华营销策略及自动驾驶监管。
items.why_en: This is the first class-action lawsuit in China against Tesla over autonomous driving claims, potentially impacting Tesla's marketing and regulatory landscape.

items.title_zh: 宏碁推出多款游戏新品：两款笔记本、一款串流掌机，还有键盘、背包
items.title_en: Acer Unveils New Gaming Laptops, Handheld, and Peripherals
items.summary_zh: IT之家 5 月 29 日消息，今天晚间，宏碁发布了一批新的移动游戏产品，重点提升性能、便携性和沉浸式体验。产品阵容包括旗舰游戏本掠夺者 Helios 18 AI、主打高性价比的宏碁 Nitro 16，以及宏碁 Nitro Blaze Link 串流掌机。其中，宏碁 Nitro 16 是宏碁首款 最高可选 AMD Ryzen 9 9955HX3D 处理器 的游戏笔记本。 两款 Windows 11 笔记本均配备高性能 CPU、 英伟达 GeForce RTX 50 系列笔记本电脑 GPU ，并附赠三个月 PC Game Pass。 宏碁同时还推出了掠夺者 Aethon 750 TKL 键盘和掠夺者 Robust Plus 背包，进一步补齐高端游戏外设和配件体验。 IT之家汇总此次发布的新品信息如下： 掠夺者 Helios 18 AI 掠夺者 Helios 18 AI 面向发烧级玩家和电竞选手打造，号称 在笔记本形态下提供桌面级性能 。处理器最高可选 英特尔酷睿 Ultra 9 290HX Plus ，显卡最高可选 英伟达 GeForce RTX 5090 笔记本电脑 GPU ，整机最高可配 256GB 内存和 6TB 存储空间。 该机配备 18 英寸 Mini LED WQUXGA 屏幕，HDR 模式下亮度达到 1000 尼特，并通过 Calman Verified 色准认证，覆盖…
items.summary_en: Acer launched new gaming products including the Predator Helios 18 AI flagship laptop (up to Intel Core Ultra 9 290HX Plus and RTX 5090), the Nitro 16 (first with AMD Ryzen 9 9955HX3D), and the Nitro Blaze Link handheld streamer. Also introduced: Predator Aethon 750 TKL keyboard and Robust Plus backpack.
items.why_zh: 宏碁新品覆盖高端到主流市场，搭载最新处理器和显卡，显示其游戏硬件布局的全面升级。
items.why_en: Acer's new lineup spans high-end to mainstream segments with latest CPUs and GPUs, signaling a comprehensive upgrade in gaming hardware.

items.title_zh: Anthropic发布Claude Opus 4.8，编程性能更强
items.title_en: Anthropic launches Claude Opus 4.8 with stronger coding performance
items.summary_zh: Anthropic发布了其最新AI模型Claude Opus 4.8，重点提升了编程性能。该版本在代码生成、调试和算法理解方面有显著改进，旨在为开发者提供更强大的辅助工具。目前尚不清楚具体的技术细节和基准测试成绩，但此次更新延续了Anthropic在AI安全与能力平衡方面的策略。
items.summary_en: Anthropic launches Claude Opus 4.8 with stronger coding performance The American Bazaar
items.why_zh: Claude Opus 4.8的发布表明Anthropic持续在编程领域与OpenAI等对手竞争，推动AI辅助开发工具进步。
items.why_en: Claude Opus 4.8 shows Anthropic's continued competition in coding AI, advancing developer tools against rivals like OpenAI.

items.title_zh: Anthropic融资650亿美元，估值超越OpenAI
items.title_en: Anthropic raises $65 billion in latest funding round, making it more valuable than OpenAI
items.summary_zh: Anthropic在最新一轮融资中筹集了650亿美元，使其估值超过OpenAI，成为全球估值最高的AI初创公司之一。这笔巨额资金将用于扩大AI模型研发、提升计算能力以及拓展商业应用。Anthropic以其对AI安全的重视而闻名，此次融资凸显了投资者对其技术路线和商业前景的信心。
items.summary_en: Anthropic raises $65 billion in latest funding round, making it more valuable than OpenAI Yahoo Finance
items.why_zh: Anthropic估值超越OpenAI标志着AI行业竞争格局的重大变化，安全优先的路线获得资本认可。
items.why_en: Anthropic surpassing OpenAI in valuation marks a major shift in AI competition, with safety-first approach gaining investor trust.

items.title_zh: IBM与红帽启动50亿美元开源AI安全计划
items.title_en: IBM and Red Hat Launch $5BN Open-Source AI Security Initiative
items.summary_zh: IBM和红帽联合宣布启动一项价值50亿美元的开源AI安全计划，旨在推动AI系统的安全性和透明度。该计划将资助开源工具开发、安全研究以及社区协作，以应对AI部署中的风险。IBM和红帽希望通过开放合作，建立更可靠的AI基础设施，降低企业对专有安全方案的依赖。
items.summary_en: IBM and Red Hat Launch $5BN Open-Source AI Security Initiative CX Today
items.why_zh: 该计划是迄今为止最大的开源AI安全投资之一，可能重塑AI安全领域的标准和实践。
items.why_en: This is one of the largest open-source AI security investments, potentially reshaping standards and practices in AI safety.

items.title_zh: 中国推出首个开源人工智能模型 助力作物保护和可持续农业发展
items.title_en: China Launches First Open-Source AI Model for Crop Protection and Sustainable Agriculture
items.summary_zh: 中国推出首个开源人工智能模型 助力作物保护和可持续农业发展 TV BRICS
items.summary_en: China released its first open-source AI model for crop protection and sustainable agriculture, helping farmers identify pests, optimize pesticide use, and boost yields while reducing environmental impact.
items.why_zh: 该模型标志着中国在AI+农业领域的重要突破，开源策略有助于加速技术普及和全球合作。
items.why_en: This model marks a breakthrough in AI for agriculture in China, with open-source approach accelerating adoption and global collaboration.

items.title_zh: 新AI伦理指数发布，帮助学校评估人工智能实际影响
items.title_en: New AI Ethics Index Launches to Help Schools Evaluate the Real-World Impact of Artificial Intelligence
items.summary_zh: 一项新的AI伦理指数正式发布，旨在帮助学校评估人工智能在教育中的实际影响。该指数提供了一套标准化的评估框架，涵盖公平性、透明度、隐私保护等关键维度。学校可以利用该指数衡量AI工具是否符合伦理准则，从而做出更明智的采购和使用决策。此举反映了教育领域对AI伦理日益增长的关注。
items.summary_en: New AI Ethics Index Launches to Help Schools Evaluate the Real-World Impact of Artificial Intelligence Yahoo Finance
items.why_zh: 该指数为教育机构提供了首个系统化的AI伦理评估工具，有助于防范AI在教育中的潜在风险。
items.why_en: This index offers the first systematic AI ethics assessment tool for schools, helping mitigate potential risks of AI in education.

items.title_zh: AppClose推出西班牙语支持及AI沟通助手，助力共同育儿
items.title_en: AppClose® Launches Spanish language support and Co-Parent Assist™ -- AI Communication Guidance for Co-Parents and Family Law
items.summary_zh: AppClose宣布推出西班牙语支持功能以及名为Co-Parent Assist的AI沟通指导工具，旨在帮助离异或分居的父母更有效地进行共同育儿沟通。该AI工具可分析对话并提供建议，减少冲突并促进合作。西班牙语支持则扩大了服务的可及性，覆盖更多家庭。AppClose致力于利用技术改善家庭法律领域的沟通效率。
items.summary_en: AppClose® Launches Spanish language support and Co-Parent Assist™ -- AI Communication Guidance for Co-Parents and Family Law PR Newswire
items.why_zh: 该AI工具将技术应用于家庭法律领域，有望改善数百万共同育儿家庭的沟通质量。
items.why_en: This AI tool applies technology to family law, potentially improving communication for millions of co-parenting families.

items.title_zh: 曝DeepSeek融资500亿，梁文锋或自投200亿
items.title_en: DeepSeek Reportedly Raising 50 Billion Yuan, Liang Wenfeng May Invest 20 Billion
items.summary_zh: 曝DeepSeek融资500亿，梁文锋或自投200亿 凤凰网
items.summary_en: DeepSeek is reportedly raising 50 billion yuan, with founder Liang Wenfeng potentially contributing 20 billion yuan personally. This would be one of the largest single financings in China's AI sector.
items.why_zh: 若融资成功，DeepSeek将获得巨额资金支持，加速大模型研发，进一步加剧国内AI竞争格局。
items.why_en: If successful, this funding would give DeepSeek massive capital to accelerate LLM development, intensifying competition in China's AI landscape.

items.title_zh: 智谱和Minimax，市值差了4000多亿港元
items.title_en: Zhipu and Minimax Market Cap Gap Exceeds 400 Billion HKD
items.summary_zh: 智谱和Minimax，市值差了4000多亿港元 36kr.com
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI and Minimax now have a market cap gap exceeding 400 billion HKD, reflecting divergent market valuations of their respective AI strategies and commercial traction.
items.why_zh: 市值差距凸显了AI赛道中技术路线和商业模式选择对估值的关键影响。
items.why_en: The valuation gap highlights how technology choices and business models critically impact AI company valuations.

items.title_zh: 36氪首发｜「穿越者」载人航天公司完成新一轮亿元融资，某头部互联网战投领投，探路者等跟投
items.title_en: Space Tourism Startup 'Chuanyuezhe' Closes 100 Million Yuan Pre-A Round
items.summary_zh: 36氪获悉，北京穿越者载人航天科技有限公司（以下简称“穿越者”）近日完成Pre-A轮亿元融资，由某头部互联网战投领投，探路者集团等跟投，老股东中天汇富、彬复资本持续加注。光源资本担任本轮独家财务顾问。本轮融资资金将重点用于“穿越者壹号（CYZ1）”载人飞船核心系统研发、地面试验验证及关键技术攻关。 公司方面表示，引入互联网、人工智能、智能制造、户外装备及文旅场景等领域的产业资本，源于商业载人航天在科技、人文、消费与场景协同上的多重需求。这不仅有助于完善产业生态，也将推动太空旅游从“少数人的高端体验”逐步走向“大众化、普惠化”的新阶段。 「穿越者」是36氪长期关注的企业。公司成立于2023年1月，专注可重复使用载人飞船研制与太空旅游运营，致力于打造中国的“龙飞船”，实现为国家和商业���成本送人送货。 过去十年，中国商业航天完成了从0到1的技术验证与基础设施搭建，涌现出近40家商业火箭总体公司。中国商业航天进入政策红利释放、技术加速成熟、资本持续涌入的产业化关键期。 需求侧，载人飞船是商业航天赛道中直接to C的产业方向。美国商业航天已经验证了“卫星互联网+太空旅游”两大高潜力方向。以SpaceX、蓝色起源、维珍银河为代表的企业，均已实现常态化商业飞行，太空旅行船票长期供不应求。 太空旅游也被视为商业航天中具备长期增长潜力的细分方向之一。工信部赛迪研究院数据显示，到2030年，全球太…
items.summary_en: Beijing-based space tourism startup Chuanyuezhe has raised 100 million yuan in Pre-A funding led by a top internet strategic investor. The funds will be used for crewed spacecraft R&D, aiming to make space tourism more accessible.
items.why_zh: 商业载人航天是AI与航天交叉的新兴赛道，此轮融资显示资本对太空旅游商业化前景的认可。
items.why_en: Commercial crewed spaceflight is an emerging AI-aerospace crossover; this round signals investor confidence in space tourism's commercial potential.

items.title_zh: 谷歌推出 Coral Board 单板计算机：1 TOPS 算力，本地运行 Gemma 3 模型
items.title_en: Google Launches Coral Board: 1 TOPS Edge AI Computer Running Gemma 3 Locally
items.summary_zh: IT之家 5 月 29 日消息，在 2026 年 I/O 开发者大会期间，谷歌推出 Coral Board， 是可以本地运行 Gemma 3 模型的小型单板计算机。 Coral Board 最大的亮点，在于搭载 Coral NPU，该机器学习单元由 Google Research 研发，基于 RISC-V（精简指令集计算架构），更适合小型设备采用与二次开发。 硬件方面，Coral Board 搭载 Synaptics Astra SL2619 芯片，内含 2GHz 双核处理器、2GB 内存和 1 TOPS 算力。 谷歌在该单板计算机上，演示运行 Gemma 3 270M 模型，让设备可在网络受限、隐私敏感或低延迟场景下处理 AI 任务。 现场演示环节，谷歌在该单板计算机上实时翻译、语音控制硬件，以及生成式音乐表演。音乐演示中，YOLOv8 模型追踪水母运动，再把运动变化转为音乐。 IT之家附上参考地址 google-coral
items.summary_en: Google unveiled Coral Board, a 1 TOPS single-board computer with a custom RISC-V NPU, capable of running Gemma 3 270M locally. Demos included real-time translation, voice control, and generative music.
items.why_zh: Coral Board展示了边缘AI的新可能，使小型设备无需联网即可运行先进模型，拓展了AI应用场景。
items.why_en: Coral Board demonstrates edge AI capabilities, enabling advanced models on small devices without internet, expanding AI use cases.

items.title_zh: 智谱市值超过小米：突破8000亿
items.title_en: Zhipu AI Market Cap Surpasses 800 Billion Yuan, Overtaking Xiaomi
items.summary_zh: 智谱市值超过小米：突破8000亿 新浪财经
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI's market cap has exceeded 800 billion yuan, surpassing Xiaomi. This milestone highlights the rising valuation of AI companies in China's capital markets.
items.why_zh: 智谱市值超越小米，表明AI公司正成为资本市场新宠，其估值逻辑与传统科技公司不同。
items.why_en: Zhipu surpassing Xiaomi shows AI companies are becoming market darlings with distinct valuation logic from traditional tech.

items.title_zh: 下一代LLM智能体合作行为演化动力学：跨提供商的实证扩展
items.title_en: Evolutionary Dynamics of Cooperation in Next-Generation LLM Agent Systems: A Cross-Provider Empirical Extension
items.summary_zh: arXiv论文扩展了Willis等人的基准研究，使用演化博弈论和迭代囚徒困境测试了四个前沿模型（Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 2.5 Flash、Gemini 3.1 Pro、GPT-5.4 Mini）的合作倾向。研究发现，这些下一代LLM智能体是否继承了前代的合作偏差，以及规模和提供商多样性如何重塑多智能体竞争中的均衡行为。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29874v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Do next-generation LLM agents inherit the cooperative biases documented in their predecessors, or does scale and provider diversity reshape equilibrium behaviour in competitive multi-agent settings? Willis et al. established a benchmark for this question using evolutionary game theory and the Iterated Prisoner's Dilemma (IPD), finding consistent cooperative biases in ChatGPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet. We extend this benchmark to four frontier models released in 2025-2026 - Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 2.5 Flash, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and GPT-5.4 Mini - a…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了LLM智能体在多智能体系统中的合作行为，对AI安全、博弈论和自主系统设计具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This research reveals cooperation behaviors in LLM agents, important for AI safety, game theory, and autonomous system design.

items.title_zh: 告别K-means：面向高效多向量检索的单阶段稀疏编码
items.title_en: No More K-means:Single-Stage Sparse Coding for Efficient Multi-Vector Retrieval
items.summary_zh: arXiv论文提出了一种新的多向量检索方法，替代了传统ColBERT模型中依赖K-means聚类的两阶段流程。该方法通过单阶段稀疏编码，避免了大规模token向量的存储和检索效率瓶颈，同时保持细粒度token级交互带来的高精度。实验表明，该方法在索引速度和检索效率上显著优于现有系统。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.30120v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Multi-vector retrieval (MVR) models, exemplified by ColBERT, have established new benchmarks in retrieval accuracy by preserving fine-grained token-level interactions. However, this granularity imposes prohibitive storage and retrieval efficiency bottlenecks: to manage the immense memory footprint and computational overhead of billion-scale token vectors, state-of-the-art systems are forced to rely on aggressive dimension reduction and complex clustering (e.g., K-means). This compromise introduces two critical limitations: excessive indexing la…
items.why_zh: 该方法有望大幅提升多向量检索系统的效率，降低存储和计算成本，推动大规模检索应用。
items.why_en: This method could significantly boost multi-vector retrieval efficiency, reducing storage and compute costs for large-scale retrieval.

items.title_zh: CodeEvolve：用于算法发现与优化的开源演化编码智能体
items.title_en: CodeEvolve: an open source evolutionary coding agent for algorithmic discovery and optimization
items.summary_zh: arXiv论文介绍了CodeEvolve，一个将大语言模型与基于岛屿的演化搜索相结合的开源框架，用于端到端算法发现。它集成了灵感交叉、元提示和深度细化等机制，在AlphaEvolve基准测试的9个问题中，有5个达到或超越AlphaEvolve的结果，在匹配条件下优于其他开源方法。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2510.14150v5 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We introduce CodeEvolve, an open-source framework that couples large language models with island-based evolutionary search for end-to-end algorithmic discovery. CodeEvolve integrates inspiration-based crossover, meta-prompting, and depth-based refinement on top of a CVT-MAP-Elites archive and a weighted LLM ensemble to generate optimized solutions for complex problems. On the AlphaEvolve benchmark suite, CodeEvolve matches or surpasses the reported AlphaEvolve results on 5 of 9 problems and, under matched conditions, outperforms the open-sour…
items.why_zh: CodeEvolve展示了LLM与演化算法结合在自动算法发现中的潜力，为AI辅助科学发现提供了新工具。
items.why_en: CodeEvolve demonstrates the potential of combining LLMs with evolutionary algorithms for automated algorithmic discovery, aiding AI-assisted scientific discovery.

items.title_zh: JMed48k：用于评估视觉语言模型的多职业日本医疗执照基准
items.title_en: JMed48k: A Multi-Profession Japanese Medical Licensing Benchmark for Vision-Language Model Evaluation
items.summary_zh: 研究人员推出了JMed48k，这是一个用于评估视觉语言模型的多职业日本医疗执照基准。该基准基于日本厚生劳动省发布的官方PDF材料构建，包含2005年至2025年间11个国家执照考试的48,862道试题和20,142张图像，视觉内容按8类分类法进行了标注。从该语料库中，研究人员提取了JMed48k-Eval，这是一个近五年的评估子集，包含12,484道计分题，其中9,905道为纯文本题。该基准旨在推动视觉语言模型在医疗领域的应用评估。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.22080v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We introduce JMed48k, a multi-profession Japanese healthcare licensing benchmark for evaluating vision-language models. Built from official PDF materials released by the Japanese Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare, JMed48k contains 48,862 exam questions and 20,142 images from 11 national licensing examinations between 2005 and 2025, with visual content annotated under an 8-type taxonomy. From this corpus, we derive JMed48k-Eval, a recent five-year evaluation subset with 12,484 scored questions, including 9,905 text-only questions an…
items.why_zh: 该基准为评估视觉语言模型在医疗领域的表现提供了标准化测试集，有助于推动AI在医疗执照考试中的应用。
items.why_en: This benchmark provides a standardized test set for evaluating vision-language models in healthcare, advancing AI applications in medical licensing exams.

items.title_zh: 通过蒸馏和量化扩展Apertus LLM系列
items.title_en: Apertus LLM Family Expansion via Distillation and Quantization
items.summary_zh: 论文验证了蒸馏和量化作为扩展大语言模型系列到新尺寸和硬件配置的经济有效方法。随着LLM在聊天助手和数据标注等广泛应用中的普及，模型需要满足预算和硬件限制，因此出现了以多种尺寸发布模型系列的趋势。该研究通过实验证明了蒸馏和量化在保持性能的同时扩展模型系列的可行性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29128v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The wide adoption of LLMs has led to their use in great variety of applications and scenarios, such as chatbot assistants and data annotation, creating the need for the models to satisfy certain budget and hardware constraints. This has led to the trend of LLMs being released in batches consisting of similar models of various sizes for the family of models to adhere to as wide of a range of constraints as possible. In this paper, we validate distillation and quantization as a cost-effective way to expand model families to new sizes and hardware f…
items.why_zh: 该研究为在资源受限环境下部署LLM提供了实用方案，有助于推动AI模型的广泛应用。
items.why_en: This research offers practical solutions for deploying LLMs under resource constraints, facilitating broader AI adoption.

items.title_zh: 通过激活感知初始化实现大语言模型的推理保持高效蒸馏
items.title_en: Reasoning-preserved Efficient Distillation of Large Language Models via Activation-aware Initialization
items.summary_zh: 论文提出了一种名为EDistill的高效蒸馏方法，通过结构化剪枝参数和调优轻量模块来压缩大语言模型。尽管EDistill模型在通用能力基准上取得了与同尺寸模型相当的性能，但研究发现其多步推理能力严重下降，称为推理崩溃。作者系统分析了推理崩溃的几何起源，并指出基于宽度缩减的SOTA EDistill方法存在问题。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29327v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Efficient Distillation (EDistill) compresses large language models (LLMs) by structured pruning parameters and tuning lightweight modules with high training efficiency. Although these EDistilled LLMs achieve state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on general ability benchmarks relative to similarly sized LLMs, we identify a severe degradation in their multi-step reasoning ability, which we term reasoning collapse. We systematically analyze the geometric origins of reasoning collapse and show that the SOTA EDistill method based on width-reducing pro…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了LLM压缩中推理能力下降的关键问题，为开发更高效的模型压缩技术提供了重要方向。
items.why_en: This work highlights a critical issue of reasoning degradation in LLM compression, guiding the development of more effective compression techniques.

items.title_zh: DeepSeek融资最新进展，大基金领投！AI芯片需求大爆发，科创芯片ETF汇添富(588750)窄幅震荡，智驾芯片“璇玑A3”发布
items.title_en: DeepSeek Funding Update: Big Fund Leads Investment, AI Chip Demand Surges
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek融资最新进展，大基金领投！AI芯片需求大爆发，科创芯片ETF汇添富(588750)窄幅震荡，智驾芯片“璇玑A3”发布 新浪财经
items.summary_en: DeepSeek's latest funding round is led by the Big Fund, while AI chip demand surges. The Sci-Tech Chip ETF (588750) trades narrowly, and the intelligent driving chip 'Xuanji A3' is released.
items.why_zh: DeepSeek融资和国家大基金领投标志着AI领域获得国家级资本支持，AI芯片需求爆发则凸显了行业增长潜力。
items.why_en: DeepSeek's funding led by the Big Fund signals national-level support for AI, and the AI chip demand surge highlights industry growth potential.

items.title_zh: 国家大基金领投DeepSeek 首轮融资；比亚迪自研4nm 智驾芯片发布；小红书官为2026 年美加墨世界杯持权转播商｜Do早报
items.title_en: Big Fund Leads DeepSeek's First Round; BYD Unveils Self-developed 4nm Intelligent Driving Chip
items.summary_zh: 国家大基金领投DeepSeek 首轮融资；比亚迪自研4nm 智驾芯片发布；小红书官为2026 年美加墨世界杯持权转播商｜Do早报 DoNews
items.summary_en: The Big Fund leads DeepSeek's first funding round at a pre-money valuation of $45 billion. BYD releases its self-developed 4nm intelligent driving chip, and Xiaohongshu becomes the official broadcaster for the 2026 World Cup.
items.why_zh: 国家大基金领投DeepSeek和比亚迪自研芯片发布，体现了中国在AI和芯片领域的自主创新与资本支持。
items.why_en: The Big Fund's investment in DeepSeek and BYD's self-developed chip highlight China's independent innovation and capital support in AI and semiconductors.

items.title_zh: Microsoft 365 Copilot迎来速度提升和更简洁设计
items.title_en: Microsoft 365 Copilot gets a speed boost and cleaner design
items.summary_zh: 微软推出了重新设计的Microsoft 365 Copilot，声称加载速度提升两倍，并提供更可靠、结构化的响应。新设计采用“渐进式披露”功能，根据用户提示显示工具和控件，而非一次性展示所有选项。用户现在可以直接在Copilot的升级版提示框中格式化文本。该更新正在桌面和移动设备上逐步推出。
items.summary_en: Microsoft is launching a revamped version of Microsoft 365 Copilot, offering a cleaner design that the company claims loads twice as fast. As part of this update, Copilot will provide more reliable and structured responses that are easier to scan, according to Microsoft. The redesign, which is rolling out across desktop and mobile devices, comes with a feature Microsoft calls "progressive disclosure." That means Copilot will present you with tools and controls based on your prompt, instead of showing a bunch of options at once. You can now format your text directly inside Copilot's upgraded pr…
items.why_zh: 此次更新显著提升了Copilot的用户体验和性能，有助于提高办公效率。
items.why_en: This update significantly improves Copilot's user experience and performance, boosting office productivity.

items.title_zh: Oculus创始人创立的对话式AI初创公司Sesame发布iOS应用
items.title_en: Sesame, the conversational AI startup from Oculus founders, launches its iOS app
items.summary_zh: Sesame推出了其iOS应用，将对话式AI代理带给公众。该应用提供更自然的交互体验，旨在减少传统聊天机器人的机械感，更像与真人对话。Sesame由Oculus创始人创立，专注于打造更人性化的AI对话。
items.summary_en: Sesame’s new iOS app brings its conversational AI agents to the public, offering more natural back-and-forth interactions designed to feel less like traditional chatbots and more like talking to a person.
items.why_zh: Sesame的iOS应用标志着对话式AI向更自然交互迈出重要一步，可能改变人机交互方式。
items.why_en: Sesame's iOS app marks a step toward more natural conversational AI, potentially transforming human-computer interaction.

items.title_zh: 消息指国家大基金领投DeepSeek首轮融资 投前估值450亿美元
items.title_en: Report: Big Fund Leads DeepSeek's First Round at $45 Billion Pre-money Valuation
items.summary_zh: 消息指国家大基金领投DeepSeek首轮融资 投前估值450亿美元 观点网
items.summary_en: Reports indicate that the Big Fund leads DeepSeek's first funding round at a pre-money valuation of $45 billion, reflecting strong market confidence and national strategic support for AI.
items.why_zh: DeepSeek高达450亿美元的估值和国家大基金的领投，凸显了AI领域的巨大价值和国家级资本的战略布局。
items.why_en: The $45 billion valuation and Big Fund's lead investment underscore AI's immense value and national strategic capital deployment.

items.title_zh: 欧洲央行敦促银行加快技术修复，AI缩短反应时间
items.title_en: ECB tells banks to speed tech fixes as AI shrinks the clock
items.summary_zh: 欧洲央行（ECB）近日敦促银行加快技术修复步伐，因为人工智能的发展正在显著缩短市场反应时间。ECB指出，AI驱动的交易和风险管理工具要求银行系统具备更快的处理速度和更高的可靠性。银行需要升级基础设施以应对AI带来的新挑战，否则可能面临运营风险。这一呼吁反映了金融监管机构对AI技术快速渗透金融领域的关注。
items.summary_en: ECB tells banks to speed tech fixes as AI shrinks the clock American Banker
items.why_zh: 这表明AI正在重塑金融监管要求，银行必须快速适应以维持系统稳定性。
items.why_en: This shows AI is reshaping financial regulatory requirements, forcing banks to adapt quickly to maintain system stability.

items.title_zh: 最富有的投资者如何看待SpaceX和OpenAI的IPO
items.title_en: How the wealthiest investors are thinking about SpaceX, OpenAI IPOs
items.summary_zh: 据雅虎财经报道，最富有的投资者正在密切关注SpaceX和OpenAI的潜在IPO。这些投资者认为，两家公司代表了科技领域的最高增长潜力，但同时也面临估值过高和市场波动风险。一些投资者计划在IPO时大举买入，而另一些则持谨慎态度，等待更合理的估值。这一动态反映了顶级投资者对AI和太空探索领域长期价值的认可。
items.summary_en: How the wealthiest investors are thinking about SpaceX, OpenAI IPOs Yahoo Finance
items.why_zh: 这揭示了顶级资本对AI和太空探索领域未来价值的判断，可能影响市场风向。
items.why_en: This reveals top capital's assessment of future value in AI and space exploration, potentially influencing market trends.

items.title_zh: Anthropic发布Opus 4.8，引入“动态工作流”工具
items.title_en: Anthropic releases Opus 4.8 with new ‘dynamic workflow’ tool
items.summary_zh: 人工智能公司Anthropic发布了其最新模型Opus 4.8，并引入了一项名为“动态工作流”的新工具。该工具允许用户根据任务需求灵活调整模型的行为和输出流程，从而提高复杂任务的执行效率。Opus 4.8在多项基准测试中表现出色，特别是在代码生成和逻辑推理方面。这一更新进一步巩固了Anthropic在AI领域的竞争力。
items.summary_en: Anthropic releases Opus 4.8 with new ‘dynamic workflow’ tool OODAloop
items.why_zh: 这标志着AI模型向更灵活、可定制的工作流方向发展，提升实际应用效率。
items.why_en: This marks a move towards more flexible, customizable AI workflows, improving practical application efficiency.

items.title_zh: OpenAI推出Rosalind生物防御计划，应对大流行病
items.title_en: OpenAI unveils Rosalind Biodefense program for pandemic preparedness
items.summary_zh: OpenAI宣布启动Rosalind生物防御计划，旨在利用人工智能技术加强大流行病的预防和应对能力。该计划将开发AI模型用于早期检测病原体、加速疫苗研发以及优化公共卫生决策。OpenAI表示，Rosalind将与非营利组织和政府机构合作，确保技术惠及全球。此举是AI在生物安全领域的重要应用。
items.summary_en: OpenAI unveils Rosalind Biodefense program for pandemic preparedness Seeking Alpha
items.why_zh: 这展示了AI在公共卫生安全中的关键作用，可能改变未来大流行病的应对方式。
items.why_en: This demonstrates AI's critical role in public health security, potentially transforming future pandemic response.

items.title_zh: 智谱振幅30%警示解禁风险 股价波动预演解禁压力
items.title_en: Zhipu's 30% price swing warns of lock-up expiration risk
items.summary_zh: 智谱振幅30%警示解禁风险 股价波动预演解禁压力 中华网
items.summary_en: Zhipu's stock price swung 30%, signaling pressure from upcoming lock-up expiration. Investors are adjusting positions to avoid risks from potential share sell-off.
items.why_zh: 这凸显了AI初创公司上市后股份解禁对市场稳定的影响，投资者需密切关注。
items.why_en: This highlights the impact of lock-up expirations on market stability for AI startups, requiring investor attention.

items.title_zh: UIC专家就AI法案和数据中心监管发表见解
items.title_en: UIC expert available to discuss AI bills, data center regulation | Newswise
items.summary_zh: 伊利诺伊大学芝加哥分校（UIC）的一位专家就当前AI法案和数据中心监管问题接受采访。该专家分析了多项拟议中的AI监管法案，指出数据中心能耗和环境影响是监管重点。专家认为，合理的监管框架既能促进AI创新，又能防范潜在风险。这一观点为政策制定者提供了参考。
items.summary_en: UIC expert available to discuss AI bills, data center regulation | Newswise Newswise
items.why_zh: 这为AI监管政策提供了学术视角，有助于平衡创新与风险。
items.why_en: This provides an academic perspective on AI regulation, helping balance innovation and risk.

items.title_zh: Anthropic估值飙升至9650亿美元，超越OpenAI
items.title_en: Anthropic's valuation surges to $965 billion, surpassing OpenAI
items.summary_zh: 人工智能公司Anthropic的估值飙升至9650亿美元，超过了竞争对手OpenAI。这一增长主要得益于其强大的技术实力和商业前景。Anthropic的Claude系列模型在多个领域表现优异，吸引了大量投资。估值超越OpenAI标志着AI行业竞争格局的重大变化。
items.summary_en: Anthropic's valuation surges to $965 billion, surpassing OpenAI MSN
items.why_zh: 这标志着AI行业竞争格局的重大变化，Anthropic成为新的领跑者。
items.why_en: This marks a major shift in AI industry competition, with Anthropic becoming a new leader.

items.title_zh: Anthropic在650亿美元融资后估值超越OpenAI
items.title_en: Anthropic Surpasses OpenAI In Valuation After Massive $65 Billion Funding Round
items.summary_zh: Anthropic在完成一轮高达650亿美元的融资后，估值超越OpenAI，成为全球估值最高的AI公司之一。这笔巨额融资将用于扩大AI模型研发和基础设施建设。投资者对Anthropic的技术路线和商业化能力充满信心。这一事件凸显了AI领域资本竞争的激烈程度。
items.summary_en: Anthropic Surpasses OpenAI In Valuation After Massive $65 Billion Funding Round International Business Times
items.why_zh: 这凸显了AI领域资本竞争的激烈程度，Anthropic凭借巨额融资实现反超。
items.why_en: This highlights intense capital competition in AI, with Anthropic overtaking OpenAI through massive funding.

items.title_zh: Anthropic联合创始人融资后身价各达80亿美元
items.title_en: Anthropic Co-Founders Worth $8 Billion Each After Funding Round
items.summary_zh: 据彭博社报道，人工智能初创公司Anthropic的联合创始人兼首席执行官达里奥·阿莫代（Dario Amodei）和总裁丹妮拉·阿莫代（Daniela Amodei）在最新一轮融资后，各自持有的股份价值约80亿美元。Anthropic是Claude AI模型的开发商，近期完成了巨额融资，估值大幅提升。这一估值反映了市场对前沿AI公司的高度追捧，但也引发了对AI行业泡沫的担忧。
items.summary_en: Anthropic Co-Founders Worth $8 Billion Each After Funding Round Bloomberg.com
items.why_zh: Anthropic作为OpenAI的主要竞争对手，其估值飙升标志着AI行业资本竞争的加剧。
items.why_en: Anthropic's soaring valuation highlights the intensifying capital race in the AI industry as a key competitor to OpenAI.

items.title_zh: 黑石与阿波罗拟为Anthropic提供360亿美元芯片债务融资
items.title_en: Blackstone and Apollo line up $36 billion chip debt deal for Anthropic
items.summary_zh: 据crypto.news报道，私募股权巨头黑石集团（Blackstone）和阿波罗全球管理（Apollo Global Management）正计划为Anthropic提供高达360亿美元的债务融资，用于支持其芯片基础设施。这笔交易将是史上最大的私人债务融资之一，旨在帮助Anthropic获取大量AI芯片以训练和运行其模型。此举凸显了AI公司对算力的巨大需求，以及金融资本对AI基础设施的浓厚兴趣。
items.summary_en: Blackstone and Apollo line up $36 billion chip debt deal for Anthropic crypto.news
items.why_zh: 这笔巨额融资凸显了AI公司对算力的巨大需求，以及金融资本对AI基础设施的浓厚兴趣。
items.why_en: This massive financing underscores AI companies' enormous compute demands and financial capital's strong interest in AI infrastructure.

items.title_zh: 一汽大众 ID. AURA T6 登陆粤港澳车展，龙船特别版同步亮相
items.title_en: FAW-Volkswagen ID. AURA T6 Debuts at Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Auto Show with Dragon Boat Edition
items.summary_zh: IT之家 5 月 29 日消息，今日，2026 粤港澳大湾区车展开幕，一汽-大众 ID. AURA T6 登陆车展现场，并带来龙船特别版。 据介绍，本次同步展出的 ID. AURA T6 龙船特别版，主色调取自木棉花的橘红底色，搭配龙船文化的金龙纹样，打造专属视觉效果。 IT之家注意到，一汽-大众 ID.AURA 序列首款车型 ID.AURA T6 于 4 月 21 日正式亮相，该车是一款“全新五座中型 SUV”。 ID.AURA T6 基于 全新 CEA 电子电气架构 打造，采用了全新的设计语言，秉持“实用自然主义美学”设计理念，车头配备了方形灯组；侧面采用半隐藏式门把手，匹配高亮黑轮眉。车辆的激光雷达、驾驶辅助小蓝灯与摄像头以集成化方式融入车身。 官方强调， ID.AURA T6 系大众首款搭载激光雷达的纯电 SUV，该车将搭载大众汽车集团与地平线合资成立的酷睿程打造的全新高端智能驾驶辅助系统，拥有同级领先算力，更懂中国路况。 同时，大众集团宣布到 2027 年，集团将在中国市场累计推出约 30 款新能源车型，到 2030 年将达到约 50 款，其中包括约 30 款纯电动车型。
items.summary_en: FAW-Volkswagen unveiled the ID. AURA T6, its first model in the ID. AURA series, at the 2026 Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Auto Show, along with a Dragon Boat special edition. The mid-size electric SUV features LiDAR and an advanced driver-assistance system developed by a joint venture with Horizon Robotics. VW plans to launch about 30 NEV models in China by 2027 and 50 by 2030.
items.why_zh: ID. AURA T6是大众首款搭载激光雷达的纯电SUV，标志着大众在中国市场加速电动化和智能化转型。
items.why_en: The ID. AURA T6 is VW's first LiDAR-equipped EV, marking its accelerated electrification and smart driving push in China.

items.title_zh: CHAI发布医疗系统AI治理指南
items.title_en: CHAI releases AI governance guidance for health systems
items.summary_zh: 据Healthcare Dive报道，健康人工智能联盟（CHAI）发布了针对医疗系统的AI治理指南。该指南旨在帮助医疗机构负责任地部署AI技术，涵盖数据隐私、算法公平性、透明度和问责制等关键领域。随着AI在医疗诊断、药物发现和患者护理中的应用日益广泛，CHAI的指南为行业提供了重要的参考框架，以确保AI的安全有效使用。
items.summary_en: CHAI releases AI governance guidance for health systems Healthcare Dive
items.why_zh: 该指南为医疗系统负责任地使用AI提供了关键框架，有助于确保患者安全和数据隐私。
items.why_en: This guidance provides a key framework for responsible AI use in healthcare, helping ensure patient safety and data privacy.

items.title_zh: “超智算一号”算力卫星正式发布 石景山区加速打造未来空间产业新高地

items.summary_zh: IT之家 5 月 29 日消息，据彭博社报道，受 AI 服务器需求强劲推动，戴尔科技集团给出的全年营收展望大幅高于市场预期。当地时间周五，戴尔股价盘前交易上涨 38%。 戴尔第一财季数据显示，截至 2027 年 1 月的财年，营收预计约为 1670 亿美元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 1.13 万亿元人民币），其中 AI 服务器销售额 将贡献 600 亿美元（现汇率约合 4075.12 亿元人民币） 。此前，戴尔预计全年营收约为 1400 亿美元，分析师平均预期为 1421 亿美元。 戴尔 d 首席运营官杰夫 · 克拉克表示，截至 5 月 1 日的季度里，戴尔 AI 订单额达到 244 亿美元 （现汇率约合 1657.21 亿元人民币），AI 服务器销售额达到 161 亿美元（现汇率约合 1093.49 亿元人民币），“AI 机遇没有任何放缓迹象。” 盘前交易中，戴尔股价一度升至 437.70 美元，上一交易日收于 317.05 美元。如果涨势延续至纽约市场开盘后，戴尔将 创下两年多来最大盘中涨幅 。戴尔服务器业务今年被市场视为 AI 浪潮受益者，截至周四收盘，戴尔股价年内涨幅已超过 150%。 2027 财年第一季度，戴尔销售额 同比增长 88% 至 438 亿美元 （现汇率约合 2974.84 亿元人民币），高于分析师平均预期的 355 亿美元。除了 AI 相关产品，搭载 CPU…
items.summary_en: Dell's revenue forecast of ~$167B for FY2027, with $60B from AI servers, beat estimates. Q1 AI orders hit $24.4B. Stock surged 38% pre-market, extending YTD gains over 150%.

items.summary_en: Most people will never own, drive, or even sit inside a Ferrari Luce . (If you can, or do… hit us up.) There's still no question that Ferrari's first electric vehicle is one of the most interesting, surprising cars of the year. With a decidedly un-Ferrari look , and lots of new technology and designs courtesy of Sir Jony Ive, the Luce is a lot of big ideas in a single swoopy package. A lot of people really hate it . Verge subscribers, don't forget you get exclusive access to ad-free Vergecast wherever you get your podcasts. Head here . Not a subscriber? You can sign up here . On this episode o…

items.summary_en: AI training startup Shift wants to clean your home for free. The catch - because, despite what its website says, there's always a catch - is that it will record cleaners as they scrub, vacuum, dust, tidy, and wash, and use that footage to train robots. Shift announced the unusual offer on social media on Thursday, explaining that the value of the training data generated from the cleanings is more than enough to fund the service. As its website puts it: "You get a spotless apartment. We get training data. Everyone wins." A promotional video shows a cleaner in a crisp white uniform and awkward-l…
items.why_zh: Shift的商业模式展示了数据收集的创新方式，可能加速家用机器人训练，但引发隐私担忧。
items.why_en: Shift's model highlights innovative data collection for robot training, but raises privacy concerns.

items.title_zh: vivo TWS 5e 耳机发布：三种配色可选、55dB 混合自适应降噪，229 元
items.title_en: vivo TWS 5e Launched: 55dB ANC, 229 Yuan
items.summary_zh: IT之家 5 月 29 日消息，在目前正在进行的 vivo 发布会中，vivo TWS 5e 耳机正式发布，定价为 229 元。 这款耳机提供留白、墨黑、天青三种颜色可选，单耳重量 4.3g，耳机拥有 IP54 认证，支持开盖闪连、蓝心小 V、AI 智慧播报、实时翻译等功能。 该耳机搭载 11mm 动圈，支持蓝牙 5.4 技术，支持 55dB 混合自适应降噪和双麦克风 AI 通话降噪，还支持空间音频技术，耳机延迟低至 42ms，同时其在配合充电盒的情况下至高提供 55 小时续航。 IT之家附耳机参数：
items.summary_en: vivo launched the TWS 5e earbuds at 229 yuan, featuring 55dB hybrid adaptive noise cancellation, Bluetooth 5.4, 11mm drivers, and up to 55 hours battery life with case.
items.why_zh: vivo TWS 5e以低价提供高端降噪和AI功能，有望推动真无线耳机市场普及。
items.why_en: The vivo TWS 5e offers high-end ANC and AI features at a low price, potentially boosting TWS earbud adoption.

items.title_zh: 华擎宣布 Taichi 十周年特别版 X870E / Z890 主板与视觉暂留效应水冷
items.title_en: ASRock Unveils Taichi 10th Anniversary Motherboards and Persistence of Vision AIO Cooler
items.summary_zh: IT之家 5 月 29 日消息，华擎科技 (ASRock) 今日正式宣布将在 COMPUTEX 2026 台北国际电脑展上展出一系列电竞硬件与 AI 相关应用解决方案。 华擎当前的旗舰系列 Taichi“太极”可追溯至 2016 年的 X99 Taichi 主板。而作为系列诞生十周年纪念的一部分，华擎将推出 X870E Taichi 10th Anniversary 与 Z890 Taichi 10th Anniversary 两款纪念主板和其它特别版产品。 此外在水冷散热器方面，华擎将带来 Taichi AQUA 360 LCD 和 Taichi 360 HOLO 。其中前者介乎标准 AIO 水冷和分体系统之间，预留 G1/4" 螺纹接口并具有透明水道和内置水流指示器；后者则是业界首款采用漂浮式 3D 显示技术的 AIO 产品，利用了视觉暂留效应。 华擎在新闻稿中提到的值得注意的产品还包括 Rock 系列水冷、Taichi TC-3000P 旗舰电源、Tiny H810 1.2L LGA 迷你主机等。
items.summary_en: ASRock announced Taichi 10th anniversary motherboards (X870E, Z890) and innovative AIO coolers, including the Taichi 360 HOLO with persistence of vision 3D display, at COMPUTEX 2026.
items.why_zh: 华擎的视觉暂留水冷展示了AI散热领域的创新，纪念主板则巩固其高端市场地位。
items.why_en: ASRock's persistence of vision cooler showcases innovation in AI cooling, while anniversary motherboards strengthen its high-end market position.

items.title_zh: OpenAI和Anthropic CEO在IPO前夕淡化AI取代工作警告
items.title_en: OpenAI, Anthropic CEOs walk back AI job warnings as IPOs loom
items.summary_zh: 随着OpenAI和Anthropic可能进行IPO，两家公司的CEO近期收回了此前关于AI将取代大量工作的警告。这一转变可能旨在安抚投资者，强调AI的辅助作用而非替代性。此前，他们曾警告AI可能导致广泛失业，但现在更强调人机协作。
items.summary_en: OpenAI, Anthropic CEOs walk back AI job warnings as IPOs loom HR Executive
items.why_zh: CEO态度转变可能影响公众和监管对AI风险的认知，并影响IPO估值。
items.why_en: The shift in CEO stance may influence public and regulatory perception of AI risks and impact IPO valuations.

items.title_zh: 美国AI巨头叛变：Claude最新模型一开口：我是DeepSeek
items.title_en: Claude's Latest Model Claims to Be DeepSeek, Sparking Controversy
items.summary_zh: 美国AI巨头叛变：Claude最新模型一开口：我是DeepSeek 驱动之家
items.summary_en: Anthropic's latest Claude model identified itself as DeepSeek during a conversation, raising questions about AI identity and model safety. Anthropic has not yet responded.
items.why_zh: 该事件暴露了AI模型可能存在的身份混淆风险，对AI可靠性和安全性提出挑战。
items.why_en: The incident highlights potential identity confusion risks in AI models, challenging AI reliability and safety.

items.title_zh: “易启未来”完成数千万元A轮融资
items.title_en: Massage Robot Startup Yiqilai Future Raises Tens of Millions in Series A
items.summary_zh: 36氪获悉，“易启未来”宣布完成数千万元A轮融资，由同创伟业、优山资本、杭州资本润苗基金等股东联合投资，天使股东网易继续加持。该公司由网易伏羲孵化，聚焦按摩机器人，自研3秒穴位识别算法与六轴机械臂运控算法。本轮资金将用于技术迭代、产品研发与规模化量产，加速海内外市场拓展。
items.summary_en: Yiqilai Future, a massage robot startup incubated by NetEase Fuxi, raised tens of millions in Series A funding from investors including Tongchuangweiye and NetEase. Funds will be used for R&D and market expansion.
items.why_zh: AI按摩机器人结合中医穴位识别，有望开拓健康服务新市场。
items.why_en: AI massage robots with acupoint recognition could open new markets in health services.

items.title_zh: Anthropic 650亿美元融资轮凸显存储芯片重要性
items.title_en: Anthropic’s $65 Billion Funding Round Highlights The Role Of Memory Chips
items.summary_zh: Anthropic完成650亿美元融资，创下AI领域融资纪录。该轮融资凸显了存储芯片在AI训练和推理中的关键作用，因为大模型需要大量高带宽内存。投资者对AI基础设施的持续投入表明，存储芯片需求将持续增长。
items.summary_en: Anthropic’s $65 Billion Funding Round Highlights The Role Of Memory Chips Forbes
items.why_zh: 该融资轮凸显了存储芯片作为AI基础设施核心组件的战略价值。
items.why_en: The funding round highlights memory chips as a strategic component of AI infrastructure.

items.title_zh: 宁王入局DeepSeek？赌的就是电
items.title_en: CATL Enters DeepSeek? Betting on Electricity
items.summary_zh: 宁王入局DeepSeek？赌的就是电 风闻
items.summary_en: Reports suggest CATL may enter DeepSeek, potentially leveraging its battery and energy storage expertise for AI applications in electricity. This would mark a traditional energy giant's expansion into AI.
items.why_zh: 宁德时代入局AI可能推动能源与AI融合，改变电力行业格局。
items.why_en: CATL's entry into AI could drive energy-AI integration and reshape the power industry.

items.title_zh: Anthropic 最新融资后估值达 9650 亿美元，超越 OpenAI
items.title_en: Anthropic reaches $965 billion valuation after fresh funding round, overtaking OpenAI
items.summary_zh: 人工智能初创公司 Anthropic 在最新一轮融资后估值达到 9650 亿美元，超越 OpenAI 成为全球估值最高的 AI 公司之一。此轮融资吸引了众多投资者，显示出市场对 AI 领域的高度关注。Anthropic 以其注重安全性的 AI 模型闻名，此次估值飙升反映了投资者对其技术路线和商业前景的强烈信心。这一变化可能重塑 AI 行业的竞争格局，推动更多公司加大在 AI 安全方面的投入。
items.summary_en: Anthropic reaches $965 billion valuation after fresh funding round, overtaking OpenAI Yahoo Finance
items.why_zh: Anthropic 估值超越 OpenAI 标志着 AI 行业竞争格局的重大变化，凸显了 AI 安全领域日益增长的市场价值。
items.why_en: Anthropic overtaking OpenAI in valuation signals a major shift in AI industry dynamics, highlighting the growing market value of AI safety.

items.title_zh: 140万亿Token背后：中国正在织一张算力网｜赛博研究所
items.title_en: Behind 140 trillion tokens: China is weaving a computing power network
items.summary_zh: 140万亿Token背后：中国正在织一张算力网｜赛博研究所 搜狐网
items.summary_en: China is building a massive computing power network to support its AI development, involving 140 trillion tokens of data processing capacity. This aims to integrate national computing resources and boost AI efficiency, potentially intensifying global competition.
items.why_zh: 中国大规模算力网络建设将显著提升其 AI 自主能力，并可能改变全球算力竞争格局。
items.why_en: China's massive computing network will significantly boost its AI autonomy and potentially reshape global computing power competition.

items.title_zh: 豆性恋，渗透婚恋圈
items.title_en: 'Bean sexuality' infiltrates dating circles
items.summary_zh: 豆性恋，渗透婚恋圈 凤凰网
items.summary_en: A new dating orientation called 'bean sexuality' is trending on social media, referring to people attracted to soy products. It reflects young people's challenge to traditional dating norms and the rapid spread of subcultures in the AI era.
items.why_zh: “豆性恋”现象揭示了 AI 时代亚文化对传统婚恋观念的冲击，值得关注其社会影响。
items.why_en: The 'bean sexuality' trend reveals the impact of subcultures on traditional dating norms in the AI era, warranting attention to its social implications.

items.title_zh: ‘Like a billionaire on acid’: Star Wars director Gareth Edwards comes out in favour of AI
items.title_en: Star Wars director Gareth Edwards comes out in favour of AI
items.summary_zh: ‘Like a billionaire on acid’: Star Wars director Gareth Edwards comes out in favour of AI The Guardian
items.summary_en: Star Wars director Gareth Edwards has voiced strong support for AI, calling it 'like a billionaire on acid' and predicting it will revolutionize filmmaking by lowering barriers to creativity.
items.why_zh: 知名导演公开支持 AI 将影响影视行业对 AI 的态度，可能加速 AI 在创意产业的应用。
items.why_en: A prominent director's public support for AI could influence the film industry's stance and accelerate AI adoption in creative fields.

items.title_zh: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.8
items.title_en: Anthropic releases Claude Opus 4.8
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 发布了其最新 AI 模型 Claude Opus 4.8，该模型在推理、代码生成和多语言能力上均有显著提升。Claude Opus 系列以安全性和可控性著称，新版本进一步优化了性能，旨在与 OpenAI 的 GPT 系列竞争。此次发布正值 Anthropic 估值飙升之际，显示出其在 AI 领域的持续创新力。
items.summary_en: Anthropic releases Claude Opus 4.8 AI News
items.why_zh: Claude Opus 4.8 的发布巩固了 Anthropic 在 AI 安全领域的领先地位，加剧了与 OpenAI 的竞争。
items.why_en: The release of Claude Opus 4.8 solidifies Anthropic's lead in AI safety and intensifies competition with OpenAI.

items.title_zh: "The pitchforks are here": Billionaires work to contain AI's populist revolt
items.title_en: 'The pitchforks are here': Billionaires work to contain AI's populist revolt
items.summary_zh: "The pitchforks are here": Billionaires work to contain AI's populist revolt Axios
items.summary_en: As AI advances, populist backlash grows over job loss and inequality. Billionaires are trying to contain the revolt through lobbying and PR, but public trust is declining, increasing regulatory pressure.
items.why_zh: AI 引发的民粹主义反抗可能影响政策制定和产业走向，亿万富翁的应对策略值得关注。
items.why_en: The populist revolt against AI could shape policy and industry direction; billionaires' response is critical.

items.title_zh: OpenAI 推出 Rosalind 生物防御计划，向联邦机构开放生命科学模型
items.title_en: OpenAI launches Rosalind Biodefense, offers federal agencies early access to its life-sciences model
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 宣布启动 Rosalind 生物防御计划，向美国联邦机构提供其生命科学模型的早期访问权限。该模型旨在加速生物医学研究，包括药物发现、疫苗设计和病原体分析。此举标志着 OpenAI 从通用 AI 向垂直领域拓展，同时响应政府对生物防御能力的需求。合作可能提升美国应对生物威胁的能力，但也引发对 AI 双用途风险的讨论。
items.summary_en: OpenAI launches Rosalind Biodefense, offers federal agencies early access to its life-sciences model R&D World
items.why_zh: OpenAI 进入生物防御领域，展示了 AI 在国家安全中的潜力，同时引发对双用途技术的伦理讨论。
items.why_en: OpenAI's entry into biodefense highlights AI's potential in national security but raises dual-use ethical concerns.

items.title_zh: 独家：OpenAI 启动生物防御计划
items.title_en: Exclusive: OpenAI launches biodefense program
items.summary_zh: 据 Axios 独家报道，OpenAI 正式启动一项生物防御计划，旨在利用其 AI 技术帮助美国应对生物威胁。该计划将向联邦机构提供先进的生命科学模型，用于预测和防范生物攻击。OpenAI 表示，此举是履行其确保 AI 造福人类的使命的一部分。然而，专家警告需谨慎管理 AI 在生物领域的滥用风险。
items.summary_en: Exclusive: OpenAI launches biodefense program Axios
items.why_zh: OpenAI 的生物防御计划是 AI 用于国家安全的重要案例，其成功与否将影响 AI 在敏感领域的应用边界。
items.why_en: OpenAI's biodefense program is a key case of AI in national security; its outcome will shape AI's role in sensitive domains.

items.title_zh: 氪星晚报 ｜联想创投等入股诺仕机器人；苹果据悉将在WWDC重点展示端侧AI能力；国家外汇管理局：4月中国外汇市场总计成交25.3万亿元
items.title_en: Lenovo Capital Leads Investment in Nuoshi Robot; Apple to Highlight On-Device AI at WWDC
items.summary_zh: 大公司： 上汽通用五菱全球车EKSION在印尼雅加达向首批用户交付 36氪获悉，5月28日，上汽集团迎来全球第一亿辆整车交付，成为我国首家累计产销量突破一亿辆的汽车集团。其中，上汽通用五菱累计贡献超3200万辆。当日，上汽通用五菱全球车EKSION在印尼雅加达向首批用户交付。 特斯拉Optimus专属机器人工厂动工，规划年产能最高可达1000万台 据报道，特斯拉位于得克萨斯州的超级工厂内，专属Optimus人形机器人工厂正式动工建设，规划年产能最高可达1000万台。该工厂将搭建第二代生产线，计划2027年夏季实现大规模量产，全面投产后日均产量约2.7万台。（界面） 智元机器人在惠州成立新公司 36氪获悉，天眼查App显示，近日，惠州智元创新科技有限公司成立，法定代表人为邓泰华，注册资本100万人民币，经营范围包括智能机器人的研发、人工智能理论与算法软件开发等。股东信息显示，该公司由智元机器人关联公司智元创新（上海）科技股份有限公司全资持股。 万科：今年已启动食品、教育等非主业的退出或剥离 万科5月29日举行2025年度股东会。万科管理层表示，在资产处置方面，继剥离冰雪业务后，今年已启动食品板块、教育板块等其他非主业的退出或剥离。在开发业务层面持续推进“城市聚焦”，在加快存量资源资产盘活的基础上，向经济实力强、人口吸引力高和行业空间较大的主要城市和板块进一步聚焦。此外，万科称2026…
items.summary_en: Lenovo Capital and others invest in Nuoshi Robot. Apple plans to highlight on-device AI at WWDC. China's forex market turnover reached 25.3 trillion yuan in April. Other news includes SAIC-GM-Wuling's global car delivery in Indonesia, Tesla's Optimus robot factory groundbreaking, and Vanke's divestiture of non-core businesses.
items.why_zh: 这些动态反映了AI与机器人领域的投资活跃度，以及苹果在端侧AI的战略布局，对行业趋势有重要指示意义。
items.why_en: These developments indicate active investment in AI and robotics, and Apple's strategic focus on on-device AI, signaling industry trends.

items.title_zh: DeepSeek概念股板块5月29日跌2.53%，博睿数据领跌，主力资金净流出25.46亿元
items.title_en: DeepSeek Concept Stocks Fall 2.53% on May 29
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek概念股板块5月29日跌2.53%，博睿数据领跌，主力资金净流出25.46亿元 搜狐网
items.summary_en: DeepSeek concept stocks fell 2.53% on May 29, led by Borui Data. Main capital net outflow reached 25.46 billion yuan, indicating bearish sentiment.
items.why_zh: 该板块下跌反映了市场对AI概念股短期风险的担忧，资金流出可能影响后续走势。
items.why_en: The decline reflects market concerns over short-term risks in AI concept stocks, with capital outflow potentially impacting future performance.

items.title_zh: 【立方基金通】腾讯、深创投收获一港股IPO/AI独角兽估值近1万亿美元/政府投资基金专题报告发布
items.title_en: Tencent, Shenzhen Capital Gain HK IPO; AI Unicorn Valued Near $1 Trillion
items.summary_zh: 【立方基金通】腾讯、深创投收获一港股IPO/AI独角兽估值近1万亿美元/政府投资基金专题报告发布 搜狐网
items.summary_en: A company backed by Tencent and Shenzhen Capital went public in Hong Kong. An AI unicorn is valued near $1 trillion. A government investment fund report was also released.
items.why_zh: AI独角兽的高估值凸显了市场对人工智能领域的强烈信心，政府投资基金报告则提供了政策层面的参考。
items.why_en: The high valuation of the AI unicorn underscores strong market confidence in AI, while the government fund report offers policy insights.

items.title_zh: 智谱股价日内飙涨23%后跳水，市值一度超越小米达8810亿港元
items.title_en: Zhipu Stock Surges 23% Then Plunges, Market Cap Briefly Exceeds Xiaomi
items.summary_zh: 智谱股价日内飙涨23%后跳水，市值一度超越小米达8810亿港元 Jiemian.com
items.summary_en: Zhipu's stock surged 23% intraday on May 29, with market cap reaching 881 billion HKD, briefly surpassing Xiaomi. It then plunged, erasing all gains, with turnover over 3.3 billion HKD.
items.why_zh: 智谱股价剧烈波动反映了市场对其估值的高度分歧，短期投机情绪浓厚。
items.why_en: The sharp volatility in Zhipu's stock reflects high market disagreement on its valuation and strong short-term speculative sentiment.

items.title_zh: Anthropic发布Claude Opus 4.8，并准备向所有客户推出Mythos级模型
items.title_en: Anthropic launches Claude Opus 4.8, prepares Mythos-class models for all customers
items.summary_zh: Anthropic发布了其最新AI模型Claude Opus 4.8，同时宣布正在准备向所有客户推出更强大的Mythos级模型。这些模型在性能上进一步提升，旨在满足企业级应用需求。
items.summary_en: Anthropic launches Claude Opus 4.8, prepares Mythos-class models for all customers Help Net Security
items.why_zh: Anthropic持续推出新模型，加剧了AI大模型领域的竞争，对行业格局有重要影响。
items.why_en: Anthropic's continuous model releases intensify competition in the AI large model space, significantly impacting the industry landscape.

items.title_zh: 智谱大涨，市值逼近9000亿港元
items.title_en: Zhipu Surges, Market Cap Approaches 900 Billion HKD
items.summary_zh: 智谱大涨，市值逼近9000亿港元 凤凰网财经
items.summary_en: Zhipu's stock surged, with market cap approaching 900 billion HKD. Despite previous volatility, the rise indicates continued market optimism.
items.why_zh: 智谱市值逼近9000亿港元，反映了AI领域的高估值和投资者对头部企业的追捧。
items.why_en: Zhipu's market cap nearing 900 billion HKD reflects high valuations in AI and investor enthusiasm for leading companies.

items.title_zh: 科氪 | OPPO Reno16系列发布，“3D悬浮星球+实况随心贴”引领潮流手机新风向
items.title_en: OPPO Reno16 Series Launched with 3D Floating Star Design
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 5 月 25 日，OPPO 举办 “Reno Land 奇幻夜”新品发布会，重磅发布多款新品，全新一代 OPPO Reno16 系列潮流手机、OPPO Pad 6 全能平板、 OPPO Pad Air5 学习平板、OPPO Enco Air5s 真无线降噪耳机、OPPO Bubble潮玩自拍屏同步登场。本次发布会围绕年轻用户学习、创作、社交、直播、游戏全场景需求，以潮流美学、实况影像创新、AI 智慧体验、跨设备生态协同为核心，实现手机、平板、耳机无缝联动；同时推出学生专属购机补贴，为学生群体打造一站式入学数码解决方案，重新定义年轻人的潮流移动智能生态。 官方图片 梦核星球美学全新突破 3D 悬浮星球工艺引领外观新风尚 OPPO Reno16 系列设计灵感源自梦核星球美学，传递 “出发吧，繁星在路上” 的青春态度。新品采用行业首创 3D 冰透悬浮工艺，首次将嵌入式微纳米印刷技术大规模量产应用于消费电子领域，于平面玻璃后盖之上打造立体悬浮星球形态，光线流转间呈现灵动裸眼 3D 视觉效果。 官方图片 Reno16 系列在细节处也尽显精致，采用一体冷雕玻璃，镜头模组与后盖浑然一体，质感精致高级；怦然星动配色选用高亮冰透玻璃背板，触感丝滑不易沾染指纹。全系标配铝合金中框，坚固抗摔、握持舒适；防护性能全面拉满，支持 IP69K 满级防水，搭配前后强化玻璃，可从容应对日常涉水、高压…
items.summary_en: OPPO launched the Reno16 series with a pioneering 3D floating star design on glass back. It features IP69K waterproofing, aluminum frame, and student subsidies. Also unveiled were OPPO Pad 6 tablet and Enco Air5s earbuds, creating a cross-device ecosystem.
items.why_zh: OPPO Reno16系列以创新工艺和AI体验吸引年轻用户，展示了手机行业在设计和生态协同上的新方向。
items.why_en: The OPPO Reno16 series attracts young users with innovative design and AI features, showcasing new directions in smartphone design and ecosystem integration.

items.title_zh: 14:57:50 财联社5月29日电，港股智谱转跌，抹去此前23%的涨幅。成交额超33亿港元，换手率0.84%。
items.title_en: Hong Kong-Listed Zhipu Turns Negative, Erases 23% Gain
items.summary_zh: 14:57:50 财联社5月29日电，港股智谱转跌，抹去此前23%的涨幅。成交额超33亿港元，换手率0.84%。 财联社
items.summary_en: At 14:57 on May 29, Zhipu's Hong Kong-listed stock turned negative, erasing a 23% gain. Turnover exceeded 3.3 billion HKD with a turnover rate of 0.84%.
items.why_zh: 智谱股价由涨转跌，显示市场情绪极不稳定，投资者需警惕短期波动风险。
items.why_en: Zhipu's reversal from gain to loss indicates highly unstable market sentiment, warning investors of short-term volatility risks.

items.title_zh: 港股智谱日内大涨22%，市值达8792亿港元，本月累涨125%|盘中速报
items.title_en: Zhipu AI Surges 22% Intraday in Hong Kong, Market Cap Reaches HKD 879.2 Billion
items.summary_zh: 港股智谱日内大涨22%，市值达8792亿港元，本月累涨125%|盘中速报 新浪财经
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI's stock surged 22% intraday in Hong Kong, pushing its market cap to HKD 879.2 billion, with a monthly gain of 125%. The rally reflects strong investor enthusiasm for AI stocks, particularly in China's large language model sector.
items.why_zh: 智谱股价暴涨显示市场对国产AI大模型的高度认可，可能带动整个AI板块估值提升。
items.why_en: Zhipu's surge signals strong market confidence in domestic AI models, potentially lifting the entire AI sector.

items.title_zh: DeepSeek狂吞17万亿Tokens？国产AI算力，最关键一战来了！
items.title_en: DeepSeek Consumes 17 Trillion Tokens, Domestic AI Computing Faces Critical Battle
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek狂吞17万亿Tokens？国产AI算力，最关键一战来了！ 新浪财经
items.summary_en: DeepSeek, a domestic AI model, has consumed 17 trillion tokens, highlighting the immense computing demands of large-scale AI. This underscores the critical battle for domestic AI computing power as China strives for technological self-sufficiency.
items.why_zh: DeepSeek的算力消耗案例凸显了国产AI在算力自主化道路上的紧迫性和重要性。
items.why_en: DeepSeek's token consumption underscores the urgency and importance of achieving computing power self-sufficiency for domestic AI.

items.title_zh: 华为云码道（CodeArts）代码智能体亮相开源鸿蒙开发者大会，发布鸿蒙专属智能体能力
items.title_en: Huawei Cloud CodeArts AI Agent Debuts at OpenHarmony Developer Conference
items.summary_zh: 华为云码道（CodeArts）代码智能体亮相开源鸿蒙开发者大会，发布鸿蒙专属智能体能力 51CTO
items.summary_en: Huawei Cloud unveiled its CodeArts AI agent at the OpenHarmony Developer Conference, featuring HarmonyOS-specific capabilities. The agent assists developers with code generation, error detection, and optimization, aiming to accelerate app development for the HarmonyOS ecosystem.
items.why_zh: 华为云CodeArts智能体将AI与鸿蒙生态深度结合，有望降低开发门槛，推动鸿蒙应用生态繁荣。
items.why_en: Huawei's CodeArts AI agent integrates AI with the HarmonyOS ecosystem, potentially lowering development barriers and boosting app ecosystem growth.

items.title_zh: 临床试验中AI与人机交互趋势研究：混合人机探索
items.title_en: Trends in AI and Human-AI Interaction in Clinical Trials -- A Hybrid Human-AI Exploration
items.summary_zh: 一项发表于arXiv的研究分析了ClinicalTrials.gov注册库中的记录，以刻画AI术语的时间趋势和AI相关试验的地理分布。研究采用混合人机方法，结合前沿生成式AI模型（GPT-5.5）和人工审查，筛选并分类AI相关试验。结果显示，AI相关试验数量随时间显著增加，近期增长尤为明显。该研究为理解AI在临床试验中的应用演变提供了数据支持。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29096v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This paper examines records retrieved from the ClinicalTrials.gov registry to characterize temporal trends in AI terminology and the geographical distribution of AI trials. The work also reports on an exploratory hybrid human-AI approach to analyzing human-AI interaction trends in registered clinical trials. The hybrid workflow comprised a frontier generative AI model (GPT-5.5) and human review to screen and categorize records returned by an AI-focused search. The findings indicate a marked increase in AI-related trials over time, with recent gro…
items.why_zh: 该研究量化了AI在临床试验中的增长趋势，为医疗AI的监管和投资决策提供参考。
items.why_en: This study quantifies the growth of AI in clinical trials, informing regulatory and investment decisions in healthcare AI.

items.title_zh: 屏幕条件动作预测的架构敏感微调：PiSAR基准
items.title_en: Architecture-Sensitive Supervised Fine-Tuning for Screen-Conditioned Action Prediction: A PiSAR Benchmark
items.summary_zh: 一项新研究提出了PiSAR基准，包含12,929条屏幕锚定行为理由语料，并评估了三种监督微调模型与前沿零样本基线在661行保留集上的表现。研究发现，前沿零样本基线（Claude Opus 4.7和GPT-5.5）在语义相似度上达到0.459，但微调模型在某些指标上表现更优。该工作为屏幕条件动作预测提供了标准化评估框架。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29400v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We benchmark three supervised fine-tuned models against frontier zero-shot baselines on a 661-row held-out slice of PiSAR (Persona, intent, Screen, Action, Rationale), a 12,929-tuple corpus of screen-anchored behavioural rationales curated from public app-store reviews, Pew American Trends Panel demographics, and the OPeRA shopper traces. Every model, frontier or fine-tuned, is evaluated on the same 661-row slice with the same scoring pipeline. Two findings. First, frontier zero-shot baselines (Claude Opus 4.7 and GPT-5.5) reach sem_sim 0.459 and…
items.why_zh: PiSAR基准为屏幕交互中的动作预测提供了标准化评估，有助于提升AI助手对用户意图的理解能力。
items.why_en: The PiSAR benchmark standardizes evaluation for screen-conditioned action prediction, improving AI assistants' understanding of user intent.

items.title_zh: 不确定性感知迁移学习用于跨建筑能耗预测
items.title_en: Uncertainty-Aware Transfer Learning for Cross-Building Energy Forecasting: Toward Robust and Scalable District-Level Energy Management
items.summary_zh: 一项研究提出基于时间融合Transformer（TFT）的不确定性感知迁移学习框架，用于跨建筑能耗预测。该框架在丹麦奥尔堡大学教育建筑（源域）和瑞士EMPA多类型建筑（目标域）的高分辨率真实子计量数据集上评估。通过引入不确定性估计，模型在目标域数据有限的情况下仍能保持鲁棒性，为区域级能源管理提供了可扩展方案。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29733v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Scaling data-driven energy forecasting to district level requires models that can be re-used across buildings with minimal target-domain data and honest uncertainty estimates. We present an uncertainty-aware transfer learning (TL) framework for cross-building energy forecasting based on the Temporal Fusion Transformer (TFT), evaluated on a newly released high-resolution real sub-meter dataset: an educational building at Aalborg University, Denmark (source) and the multi-typology NEST building at EMPA, Switzerland (target). We introduce the Transf…
items.why_zh: 该框架解决了跨建筑能耗预测中数据稀缺和不确定性量化难题，对智慧城市能源管理具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This framework addresses data scarcity and uncertainty in cross-building energy forecasting, crucial for smart city energy management.

items.title_zh: 开源安全防护模型综合基准评估
items.title_en: Benchmarking Open-Source Safety Guard Models: A Comprehensive Evaluation
items.summary_zh: 一项研究对14个开源安全防护模型进行了全面评估，使用包含79,331个样本的基准数据集，覆盖NIST AI风险框架的8个安全类别。数据集整合了HarmBench、StrongREJECT、RealToxicityPrompts和BeaverTails，聚焦暴力、仇恨言论、骚扰、色情内容、自杀/自残、脏话等安全相关内容。评估为选择合适的安全防护模型提供了参考。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.28830v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in safety-critical applications, robust content moderation becomes essential. We present a comprehensive evaluation of 14 open-source safety guard models on a curated benchmark of 79,331 samples spanning 8 NIST AI Risk Framework safety categories. Our benchmark aggregates four diverse datasets (HarmBench, StrongREJECT, RealToxicityPrompts, and BeaverTails), filtered to focus exclusively on safety-relevant content (violence, hate speech, harassment, sexual content, suicide/self-harm, prof…
items.why_zh: 该评估为AI安全部署提供了开源防护模型的性能基准，有助于提升大模型的内容安全水平。
items.why_en: This benchmark guides the selection of open-source safety models, enhancing content safety in LLM deployments.

items.title_zh: 儿童语音转录：ASR性能与可靠正字法转录获取
items.title_en: Transcribing Children's Speech: ASR Performance and Obtaining Reliable Orthographic Transcriptions
items.summary_zh: 一项研究评估了9个来自三个模型家族的先进ASR模型在儿童语音转录上的表现。由于儿童专用预训练模型有限且噪声条件多样，儿童语音的ASR转录质量仍具挑战。研究通过两个研究问题探讨了当前ASR模型在低资源语言儿童语音上的有效性，为儿童语音研究中的自动转录应用提供了指导。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.28833v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) has the potential to substantially reduce manual annotation effort in child speech research by generating automatic transcriptions. However, obtaining reliably high-quality ASR transcriptions for child speech remains challenging in low-resource languages due to limited child-specific pre-trained models and highly diverse noise conditions. This study investigates the effectiveness of state-of-the-art ASR models on child speech through two research questions, by evaluating nine ASR models from three model famili…
items.why_zh: 该研究为儿童语音研究中的自动转录技术选型提供了实证依据，有助于减少人工标注工作量。
items.why_en: This study guides ASR model selection for child speech research, potentially reducing manual annotation effort.

items.title_zh: 爱因斯坦望远镜模拟数据分析中智能体AI的首次正面比较
items.title_en: First head-to-head comparison of agentic AI applied to the analysis of simulated data of the Einstein Telescope
items.summary_zh: arXiv预印本报告了两种最先进的智能体AI系统——Anthropic的Claude Code和OpenAI的Codex——在共享计算基础设施上自主执行端到端引力波数据分析管道的首次正面比较。该管道包括从爱因斯坦望远镜模拟噪声中估计功率谱密度、生成几何模板库、匹配滤波恢复100个双黑洞信号注入、自动生成结果以及大语言模型辅助产品生成等步骤。研究旨在评估AI在无需人工干预的情况下完成复杂科学数据分析任务的能力。结果表明，两种系统均能成功执行管道，但在效率和准确性上存在差异。这一比较为未来在科学计算中部署自主AI代理提供了重要参考。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.28916v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We report a comparison of two state-of-the-art agentic AI systems, Claude Code (Anthropic) and Codex (OpenAI), tasked with autonomously executing a simple end-to-end gravitational wave data analysis pipeline on a shared computing infrastructure without human intervention. The pipeline comprises power spectral density estimation from raw Einstein Telescope simulated noise, geometric template bank generation, matched filter recovery of 100 binary black hole signal injections, automated results generation, and large language model-assisted product…
items.why_zh: 这是首次直接比较两种顶级智能体AI在科学数据分析中的自主性能，对评估AI在科研自动化中的潜力具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This is the first direct comparison of two top agentic AI systems in autonomous scientific data analysis, crucial for evaluating AI's potential in research automation.

items.title_zh: 科学机器学习中的多机制模式：不同失败模式与机制特定优化
items.title_en: Unveiling Multi-regime Patterns in SciML: Distinct Failure Modes and Regime-specific Optimization
items.summary_zh: 该研究通过一个机制感知的诊断框架，分析了科学机器学习（SciML）模型在不同超参数设置下的多机制行为。该框架联合分析性能、训练动态和损失景观几何。研究发现三个关键结果：（i）在许多标准SciML模型中一致出现三机制结构；（ii）不同机制对应不同的失败模式；（iii）需要针对特定机制进行优化策略。这一发现有助于理解SciML模型的训练行为，并为提高模型鲁棒性和性能提供指导。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29153v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Neural networks trained under different hyperparameter settings can fall into distinct training "regimes," with consistent behavior within regimes and qualitative differences across regimes. In this paper, we study such multi-regime behavior in scientific machine learning (SciML) models through a regime-aware diagnostic framework that jointly analyzes performance, training dynamics, and loss-landscape geometry. We identify three key findings: (i) a consistent three-regime structure emerges across many standard SciML models, different constraint…
items.why_zh: 揭示了SciML模型训练中的多机制行为，有助于理解模型失败模式并指导优化，对提升科学计算中机器学习模型的可靠性至关重要。
items.why_en: Unveiling multi-regime behavior in SciML models helps understand failure modes and guide optimization, crucial for improving reliability of ML in scientific computing.

items.title_zh: 迈向道德的面部年龄估计：无需儿童数据训练的广义零样本基准
items.title_en: Toward Ethical Facial Age Estimation: A Generalized Zero-Shot Benchmark Without Training on Children's Data
items.summary_zh: 该研究提出了一种用于面部年龄估计的广义零样本基准，明确在训练中排除儿童数据，同时仍能评估模型对年轻人群的性能。研究重新审视了六个广泛使用的数据集，并引入了严格的年龄组分离标准：训练、验证和测试样本年龄为18-59岁；而18岁以下样本仅用于零样本测试。这种方法解决了使用儿童图像训练年龄估计模型所引发的伦理、法律和隐私问题。基准测试表明，模型在零样本设置下对儿童年龄估计仍有一定能力，但性能显著下降，凸显了该领域的挑战。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29230v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Age estimation from facial images typically relies on training data that includes images of minors, a practice that raises serious ethical, legal, and privacy concerns. In this work, we propose a generalized zero-shot benchmark for facial age estimation that explicitly excludes children's data during training while still assessing model performance on younger populations. We revisit six widely used datasets and introduce standardized splits with strict age-group separation: samples aged 18-59 for training, validation, and testing; samples under…
items.why_zh: 该基准解决了年龄估计中训练数据包含儿童图像的伦理问题，为开发更道德的AI系统提供了重要参考。
items.why_en: This benchmark addresses ethical concerns of training age estimation models on children's data, providing a crucial reference for developing more ethical AI systems.

items.title_zh: 进化搜索中的计算分配：从深度-广度到多臂老虎机
items.title_en: Compute Allocation in Evolutionary Search: From Depth-Breadth to Multi-Armed Bandits
items.summary_zh: 该研究探讨了在大语言模型引导的进化搜索（Evolve系统）中，如何分配固定预算的LLM调用。通过扫描五个模型和三个任务上的深度-广度网格，研究发现了两个经验规律：一个适应度-计算包络线，其中能力排序在很大程度上被效果所掩盖；以及单次运行结果的不稳定性。研究建议采用多臂老虎机等自适应分配策略，以更可靠地达到最佳性能。这项工作为优化进化搜索中的计算资源分配提供了指导。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29268v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: LLM-guided evolutionary search (Evolve systems) has reached state-of-the-art results on mathematical and combinatorial tasks, yet most existing systems report only the best of many runs and leave the run-to-run distribution undocumented. We ask how a fixed budget of LLM calls should be allocated, and how reliably a single run reaches the reported numbers. Sweeping the depth-breadth grid over five models and three tasks, we identify two empirical regularities: a fitness-compute envelope along which capability ordering largely collapses on effect…
items.why_zh: 为进化搜索中的计算资源分配提供了经验规律和优化策略，有助于提高LLM引导搜索的效率和可靠性。
items.why_en: Provides empirical regularities and optimization strategies for compute allocation in evolutionary search, improving efficiency and reliability of LLM-guided search.

items.title_zh: LoopFM：从基础模型的历史表示中学习推荐
items.title_en: LoopFM: Learning frOm HistOrical RePresentations of Foundation Model for Recommendation
items.summary_zh: 知识蒸馏通常将大型基础模型（FM）的单一标量预测迁移到紧凑的垂直模型（VM），但存在迁移率递减的问题。为此，本文提出LoopFM框架，通过将FM的中间嵌入结构化为输入特征（如用户历史），开辟高带宽迁移通道。该方法使VM能够捕获FM丰富的中间知识，从而显著提升迁移效果。实验表明，LoopFM在多个推荐任务上优于传统蒸馏方法，有效缓解了信息瓶颈。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29280v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Knowledge distillation (KD) transfers a single scalar prediction from a large foundation model (FM) to compact vertical models (VMs), suffering from diminishing transfer ratio -- the fraction of FM improvement captured by the VM -- as a single scalar cannot convey the rich intermediate knowledge that larger FMs learn. To address this bottleneck, we propose LoopFM (Learning frOm HistOrical ReP*resentations of FM), a framework that opens a high-bandwidth transfer channel by structuring FM intermediate embeddings as input features (e.g., user hist…
items.why_zh: 提出了一种新的知识蒸馏方法，通过利用基础模型的中间表示显著提升推荐系统的性能，解决了传统蒸馏的信息瓶颈问题。
items.why_en: Proposes a novel knowledge distillation method using intermediate representations from foundation models, significantly improving recommendation performance and addressing the information bottleneck in traditional distillation.

items.title_zh: 从企业违约预测模型中提取进化规则
items.title_en: Evolutionary Rule Extraction from Corporate Default Prediction Models
items.summary_zh: 中小企业（SME）在大多数经济体中占企业多数，且常面临财务约束和更高的财务困境风险。预测中小企业违约对金融机构、政策制定者和研究人员至关重要。尽管机器学习提高了信用风险建模的预测性能，但复杂模型的可解释性不足引发透明度和合规性担忧。本研究通过进化算法从机器学习模型中提取可解释的规则，用于预测中小企业违约。该方法在保持较高预测精度的同时，提供了清晰的决策规则，有助于满足监管要求并增强模型信任度。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29478v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) represent the majority of firms in most economies and often face financial constraints and higher vulnerability to financial distress. Predicting SME default is therefore crucial for financial institutions, policymakers, and researchers. Recent advances in machine learning (ML) have improved predictive performance in credit risk modeling. Yet, the limited interpretability of complex models raises concerns regarding transparency and regulatory compliance. This study investigates SME's default predictors…
items.why_zh: 通过进化规则提取提高了信用风险模型的可解释性，对满足金融监管要求和增强模型信任度具有重要意义。
items.why_en: Improves interpretability of credit risk models via evolutionary rule extraction, crucial for regulatory compliance and trust in financial AI.

items.title_zh: GPIC：用于视觉生成的大型许可图像语料库
items.title_en: GPIC: A Giant Permissive Image Corpus for Visual Generation
items.summary_zh: 研究可扩展的视觉生成方法需要大型、可访问且稳定的数据集。本文介绍GPIC，一个包含约28万亿像素的大型许可图像语料库。GPIC包含由最先进视觉语言模型标注的多样化互联网图像，包括1亿训练样本、20万验证样本和100万测试样本。所有图像均获得研究及商业用途的许可。数据集经过安全过滤、去重，并托管在Hugging Face上。此外，还提供了一个基准测试协议，用于评估视觉生成模型。GPIC为视觉生成研究提供了高质量、大规模且合规的数据资源。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.30341v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Studying scalable methods for visual generative modeling requires large, accessible, and stable datasets. We introduce GPIC, a Giant Permissive Image Corpus of approximately 28 trillion pixels. GPIC comprises diverse internet images captioned by a state-of-the-art vision-language model, including 100M training, 200K validation, and 1M test examples. Moreover, all GPIC images are permissively licensed for both research and commercial use. GPIC is safety-filtered, deduplicated, and centrally hosted on Hugging Face. We provide a benchmarking proto…
items.why_zh: 提供了大规模、合规且高质量的图像数据集，对推动视觉生成模型的研究和商业化应用具有重要价值。
items.why_en: Provides a large-scale, permissively licensed, high-quality image dataset, crucial for advancing visual generation research and commercial applications.

items.title_zh: 超越准确性：时间序列基础模型是否校准良好？
items.title_en: Beyond Accuracy: Are Time Series Foundation Models Well-Calibrated?
items.summary_zh: 尽管时间序列基础模型在预测性能上达到了最先进水平，但其校准特性（即预测置信度与实际正确率的一致性）尚未得到充分研究。本文调查了五个近期时间序列基础模型和两个竞争基线的校准相关属性。通过一系列实验，研究发现这些模型普遍存在校准不良的问题，即预测概率不能准确反映实际准确性。校准不良可能导致在关键应用（如金融、医疗）中做出错误决策。研究强调了在时间序列基础模型中评估和改进校准的重要性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2510.16060v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The recent development of foundation models for time series data has generated considerable interest in using such models across a variety of applications. Although foundation models achieve state-of-the-art predictive performance, their calibration properties remain relatively underexplored, despite the fact that calibration can be critical for many practical applications. In this paper, we investigate the calibration-related properties of five recent time series foundation models and two competitive baselines. We perform a series of s…
items.why_zh: 揭示了时间序列基础模型校准不良的问题，对确保模型在关键应用中的可靠性具有重要意义。
items.why_en: Reveals poor calibration in time series foundation models, crucial for ensuring reliability in critical applications like finance and healthcare.

items.title_zh: 当2D任务遇上1D序列化：结构化任务中的序列化摩擦
items.title_en: When 2D Tasks Meet 1D Serialization: On Serialization Friction in Structured Tasks
items.summary_zh: 在大型语言模型时代，许多符号和结构化问题通过一维文本序列化呈现给模型。然而，有些问题本质上是二维的，其相关关系（如行列对应或空间邻接）由二维布局中的位置定义，而非顺序。这引发了一个表征问题：在一维序列中保留相同的符号条目是否也能保留计算所需的关系结构？本研究通过序列化摩擦的视角探讨这一问题，分析了将二维结构强制转换为线性序列时可能丢失的关键信息，并评估了不同序列化策略对模型性能的影响。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2604.27272v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: In the LLM era, many symbolic and structured problems are presented to models through 1D text serialization. Yet some such problems are natively two-dimensional: their relevant relations, such as row--column correspondence or spatial adjacency, are defined by position in a 2D layout rather than by sequential order. This raises a representational question: does preserving the same symbolic entries in a 1D sequence also preserve the relational structure needed for computation? We study this issue through the lens of serialization friction…
items.why_zh: 揭示了当前LLM处理结构化任务时的一个根本性局限，对改进模型设计具有重要意义。
items.why_en: Highlights a fundamental limitation of LLMs in handling structured tasks, crucial for improving model design.

items.title_zh: MedMosaic：多样化医学音频的大规模挑战性基准
items.title_en: MedMosaic: A Challenging Large Scale Benchmark of Diverse Medical Audio
items.summary_zh: 由于隐私法规和高昂的标注成本，医学音频数据难以收集，现有基准往往未能充分代表复杂的医学音频场景。为此，研究者提出了MedMosaic，一个医学音频问答数据集，旨在在现实临床约束下对语言和音频推理模型进行基准测试。MedMosaic包含多种医学音频类型，包括与疾病相关的生理声音、精心构建的合成语音等，为评估模型在医学音频理解方面的能力提供了全面且具有挑战性的测试平台。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.00969v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Medical audio data is difficult to collect due to privacy regulations and high annotation costs arising from domain expertise. Thus, existing benchmarks tend to underrepresent complex medical audio scenarios. To address this challenge, we present MedMosaic, a medical audio question-answering dataset designed to benchmark language and audio reasoning models under realistic clinical constraints. MedMosaic features a diverse range of medical audio types, including condition-related physiological sounds, carefully constructed synthetic voic…
items.why_zh: 填补了医学音频基准的空白，推动AI在医疗音频分析领域的发展。
items.why_en: Fills a gap in medical audio benchmarks, advancing AI in healthcare audio analysis.

items.title_zh: AI天气模型能否预测两周以上？长时程滚动的定量基准与分析
items.title_en: Can AI Weather Models Predict Beyond Two Weeks? A Quantitative Benchmark and Analysis of Long Rollouts
items.summary_zh: 尽管AI天气模型在短期到中期预报（最多15天）中表现出色，但在更长的时间跨度上经常出现定义不清的“不稳定性”。本研究通过九个最先进AI天气模型的全年滚动预报，将这些失败分为三种不同模式：爆炸、漂移和季节性丧失。分析表明，稳定性取决于对小时空尺度的处理：不稳定的模型会放大高频能量，而稳定的模型则能保持合理的能量分布。该工作为评估和改进AI天气模型的长时程预报能力提供了系统框架。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.30184v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: While AI weather models excel at short-to-medium range forecasts (up to 15 days), they frequently suffer from ill-defined "instabilities" when rolled out over longer horizons. This work addresses the lack of a formal taxonomy by categorizing these failures into three distinct regimes: blow-up, drift, and loss of seasonality, through year-long rollouts of nine state-of-the-art AI weather models. Our analysis reveals that stability hinges on the treatment of small spatio-temporal scales: unstable models amplify high-frequency energy, while stable m…
items.why_zh: 为AI天气模型的长时程预报提供了首个系统性分类和基准，对提升气候预测能力至关重要。
items.why_en: Provides the first systematic taxonomy and benchmark for long-range AI weather forecasting, critical for improving climate prediction.

items.title_zh: RightNow-Arabic-0.5B-Turbo：通过词汇注入和边缘优先部署的开源亚10亿参数阿拉伯语模型
items.title_en: RightNow-Arabic-0.5B-Turbo: An Open Sub-1B Arabic Language Model via Vocabulary Injection and Edge-First Deployment
items.summary_zh: 开源阿拉伯语大语言模型分为两类：亚10亿参数的多语言模型（如Qwen2.5-0.5B）将阿拉伯语视为次要语言，而70亿至700亿参数的阿拉伯语专用模型（如Jais、AceGPT）需要服务器才能运行。此前唯一公开的亚20亿参数阿拉伯语专用模型Kuwain-1.5B未发布权重。研究者提出了RightNow-Arabic-0.5B-Turbo，一个5.18亿参数的阿拉伯语专用解码器LLM，基于Qwen2.5-0.5B构建。其流程通过均值子词初始化添加了27,032个阿拉伯语token，并继续预训练，实现了在边缘设备上的高效部署。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.28827v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Open Arabic large language models split into two classes: sub-1B multilingual models that treat Arabic as an afterthought (Qwen2.5-0.5B, Falcon-H1-0.5B), and 7B-70B Arabic-specialized models that require a server to run (Jais, AceGPT, ALLaM, SILMA). The one published attempt at a sub-2B Arabic-specialized model, Kuwain-1.5B, never released its weights. We present RightNow-Arabic-0.5B-Turbo, a 518M-parameter Arabic-specialized decoder LLM built on Qwen2.5-0.5B. The pipeline adds 27,032 Arabic tokens via mean-subtoken initialization, continues pr…
items.why_zh: 填补了轻量级阿拉伯语专用模型的空白，使得在资源受限设备上运行阿拉伯语AI成为可能。
items.why_en: Fills the gap for lightweight Arabic-specialized models, enabling Arabic AI on resource-constrained devices.
